title: tournesol brocchiana
intro: Tournesol brocchiana, also known as sunflower broom or Helianthus angustifolius, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and narrow leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Tournesol brocchiana include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments, including skin issues and respiratory problems.
